verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.title: Verify your email
verification.content: Please verify your email address to complete your account setup.
verification.warning: This link expires soon. If you did not create an account, you can ignore this email.

footer.ignore: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

invitation.title: Workspace invitation
invitation.content: You have been invited to join a workspace. Click the button below to accept the invitation.

footer.ignore: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

reset.subject: Reset your password
reset.title: Reset your password
reset.content: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new password.
reset.warning: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
